risks.title: Embedded Chrome cannot access chrome extensions management UI
risks.impact: Load unpacked and extension inspection cannot be completed in this browser surface.

risks.title: Live token and WebSocket evidence unavailable
risks.impact: Token present UI, live WebSocket connection, runtime tab, and DevTools checks remain unverified.

risks.title: Public package freeze blocked
risks.impact: Public release and Chrome Web Store submission remain NO-GO until live Chrome QA evidence is captured.

mitigation: Run the same public variant staging folder in a human-controlled Chrome profile where chrome://extensions and Load unpacked are available.
